full_text:
Cheng Gongying 成公英
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Gongying (成公英). Served Han Sui as a strategist. Suggested hiding among the Qiang. Submitted to Cao Cao. Cheng Gongying was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
